name: Automated web scraping: email a CSV, save to Google Sheets & Microsoft Excel
description: Scrapes a target URL with Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to extract structured data (e.g. product listings, business info), emails the results via Gmail, and saves them to a new Google Sheets spreadsheet.

source.originalName: Automated web scraping: email a CSV, save to Google Sheets & Microsoft Excel

recipientEmail.description: Email address to receive the scraped data

steps.name: Scrape the target URL with Firecrawl
Build Claude prompt for data extraction
Run Claude AI to extract structured data
Format extracted data for Google Sheets and email
Save extracted data to Google Sheets
